auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Addressfinder API key sent as the key query parameter. Find it in your Addressfinder Portal project credentials: https://portal.addressfinder.net/.

extraFields.label: API Secret
extraFields.description: Addressfinder API secret sent in the Authorization header for server-to-server requests. Find it with the API key in your Addressfinder Portal project credentials: https://portal.addressfinder.net/.

actions.name: find_au_addresses
actions.description: Search Australian addresses with Addressfinder autocomplete and return matching address completions.

query.description: The partial Australian address being searched.

max.description: The maximum number of results to return.

source.description: The Australian address dataset source to query.

canonical.description: Set this flag to 1 when the option should be enabled.

items.description: One Australian state or territory code.

stateCodes.description: Australian state or territory codes used to filter results.

domain.description: Optional registered Addressfinder domain used for portal activity monitoring.

highlight.description: Set this flag to 1 when the option should be enabled.

ascii.description: Set this flag to 1 when the option should be enabled.

success.description: Whether Addressfinder reported the request as successful.

canonical_address_id.description: The canonical address identifier for this result.

highlighted_full_address.description: The highlighted full address when the highlight option is enabled.

items.description: One Australian address autocomplete completion returned by Addressfinder.

completions.description: The autocomplete completions returned by Addressfinder.

endpoint.description: The Addressfinder API endpoint path used for the request.

meta.description: Connector metadata for the Addressfinder API request.

raw.description: The raw Addressfinder object returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: The Addressfinder Australian address autocomplete response.

actions.name: find_nz_addresses
actions.description: Search New Zealand addresses with Addressfinder autocomplete and return matching address completions.

query.description: The partial New Zealand address being searched.

max.description: The maximum number of results to return.

strict.description: How closely Addressfinder should match the query.

regionCode.description: The New Zealand regional authority code used to filter results.

domain.description: Optional registered Addressfinder domain used for portal activity monitoring.

highlight.description: Set this flag to 1 when the option should be enabled.

ascii.description: Set this flag to 1 when the option should be enabled.

inputSchema.description: Input for New Zealand address autocomplete.

success.description: Whether Addressfinder reported the request as successful.

a.description: The canonical New Zealand address string.

v.description: Whether the result is postal or physical according to Addressfinder.

highlighted_a.description: The highlighted address when the highlight option is enabled.

items.description: One New Zealand address autocomplete completion returned by Addressfinder.

completions.description: The autocomplete completions returned by Addressfinder.

endpoint.description: The Addressfinder API endpoint path used for the request.

meta.description: Connector metadata for the Addressfinder API request.

raw.description: The raw Addressfinder object returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: The Addressfinder New Zealand address autocomplete response.

actions.name: get_au_address_metadata
actions.description: Retrieve full metadata for an Australian address selected from Addressfinder autocomplete.

id.description: The Addressfinder address identifier returned by autocomplete.

dpid.description: The Australia Post delivery point identifier.

source.description: The Australian address dataset source to query.

gps.description: Set this flag to 1 when the option should be enabled.

census.description: The Australian census year for statistical identifiers.

domain.description: Optional registered Addressfinder domain used for portal activity monitoring.

ascii.description: Set this flag to 1 when the option should be enabled.

inputSchema.description: Input for retrieving Australian address metadata.

success.description: Whether Addressfinder reported the request as successful.

address.description: The raw Addressfinder object returned by the API.

endpoint.description: The Addressfinder API endpoint path used for the request.

meta.description: Connector metadata for the Addressfinder API request.

outputSchema.description: The Addressfinder Australian address metadata response.

actions.name: get_nz_address_metadata
actions.description: Retrieve full metadata for a New Zealand address selected from Addressfinder autocomplete.

pxid.description: The Addressfinder PXID returned by autocomplete.

dpid.description: The NZ Post delivery point identifier.

census.description: The New Zealand census year for Statistics NZ metadata.

domain.description: Optional registered Addressfinder domain used for portal activity monitoring.

ascii.description: Set this flag to 1 when the option should be enabled.

success.description: Whether Addressfinder reported the request as successful.

address.description: The raw Addressfinder object returned by the API.

actions.name: verify_au_address
actions.description: Verify and enrich an Australian address with Addressfinder address verification.

gnaf.description: Set this flag to 1 when the option should be enabled.

paf.description: Set this flag to 1 when the option should be enabled.

postBox.description: Exclude box type addresses from the verification results.

gps.description: Set this flag to 1 when the option should be enabled.

extended.description: Set this flag to 1 when the option should be enabled.

census.description: The Australian census year for statistical identifiers.

items.description: One Australian state or territory code.

stateCodes.description: Australian state or territory codes used to filter results.

domain.description: Optional registered Addressfinder domain used for portal activity monitoring.

ascii.description: Set this flag to 1 when the option should be enabled.

inputSchema.description: Input for verifying an Australian address.

success.description: Whether Addressfinder reported the request as successful.

anyOf.description: Whether Addressfinder matched the submitted address.
The raw Addressfinder object returned by the API.

endpoint.description: The Addressfinder API endpoint path used for the request.

meta.description: Connector metadata for the Addressfinder API request.

raw.description: The raw Addressfinder object returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: The Addressfinder Australian address verification response.
